'''Presley Cassell''' (born 6 October 2006) is an English professional [[rugby league]] footballer who plays as a {{rlp|lf}} or {{rlp|pr}} for the [[Leeds Rhinos]].

He previously played for [[Hunslet RLFC|Hunslet]] in the [[RFL Championship]] on loan from [[Leeds Rhinos|Leeds]].

==Background==
Cassell was born [[Halifax, West Yorkshire]], England.

He played junior and youth rugby for Ovenden and Siddal, as well as Bradford club West Bowling.<ref>[https://www.yorkshireeveningpost.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/introducing-presley-cassell-teenage-leeds-rhinos-talent-tipped-for-the-top-in-rugby-league-5237584 Introducing Presley Cassell: teenage Leeds Rhinos talent tipped for the top in rugby league]</ref> He has played for England at Academy level.<ref>[https://www.therhinos.co.uk/article/20789/academy-spotlight-presley-cassell Academy Spotlight: Presley Cassell]</ref><ref>[https://www.seriousaboutrl.com/rugby-league-news-leeds-rhinos-rising-star-earns-sam-burgess-comparison-after-dominant-hull-kr-performance-107708/ Leeds Rhinos rising star earns Sam Burgess comparison after dominant Hull KR performance]</ref>

==Career==
===Leeds Rhinos===
Cassell made his [[Leeds Rhinos]] debut in the [[Super League]] against the [[Salford Red Devils]] in 2025.<ref>[https://www.totalrl.com/freakish-leeds-rhinos-prospect-turning-heads/ ‘Freakish’ Leeds Rhinos prospect turning heads]</ref>

===Hunslet RLFC (loan)===
On 5 March 2026 it was reported that he had signed for [[Hunslet RLFC|Hunslet]] in the [[RFL Championship]] on a one-week loan.<ref>{{cite web|website=Love Rugby League|date=5 Mar 2026|author=Louis Chapman Coombe|title=Leeds Rhinos trio make immediate Championship loan switch|url=https://www.loverugbyleague.com/post/leeds-rhinos-trio-make-immediate-championship-loan-switch}}</ref>

===Huddersfield Giants (loan)===
On 17 March 2026 it was reported that he had signed for [[Huddersfield Giants]] in the [[Super League]] on loan<ref>{{cite web|website=Love Rugby League|date=17 Mar 2026|author=Matthew Shaw|title=Huddersfield Giants complete triple Leeds Rhinos loan swoop|url=https://www.loverugbyleague.com/post/huddersfield-giants-leeds-rhinos-loan}}</ref>
